productDisplayName: Lotto Men Black Dunk HI Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for urban style and comfort, the lotto Dunk Hi has a great sporty look which will ensure your feet are the centre of attention.  Product Details White and green mid-top shoe with synthetic leather upper, patent overlays and lightly perforated toe upper and sides and central lace-ups Meshed and padded tongue and inner Haul loop on back ankle Full length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protection Chunky look sole with herringbone grooves Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
